notableEvents.label: Pickoff
notableEvents.detail: Pitcher Stephen Kolek picks off Cam Smith at 1st on throw to first baseman Jac Caglianone.

notableEvents.label: Christian Walker reached on error
notableEvents.detail: Christian Walker reaches on a throwing error by third baseman Maikel Garcia.

notableEvents.label: Joey Loperfido GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Joey Loperfido grounds into a double play, shortstop Bobby Witt Jr. to first baseman Jac Caglianone. Christian Walker out at 2nd. Joey Loperfido out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Cam Smith GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Cam Smith grounds into a double play, pitcher Stephen Kolek to second baseman Michael Massey to first baseman Jac Caglianone. Christian Walker out at 2nd. Cam Smith out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Cam Smith rally-killer GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Cam Smith grounds into a double play, pitcher Stephen Kolek to second baseman Michael Massey to first baseman Jac Caglianone. Christian Walker out at 2nd. Cam Smith out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Fielding error
notableEvents.detail: Christian Walker reaches on a throwing error by third baseman Maikel Garcia.

notableEvents.label: Throwing error
notableEvents.detail: Christian Walker reaches on a throwing error by third baseman Maikel Garcia.

notableEvents.label: Stolen base
notableEvents.detail: Bobby Witt Jr. steals (26) 2nd base. Bobby Witt Jr. to 3rd. Bobby Witt Jr. advances to 3rd, on a throwing error by catcher Collin Price.
